creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Your patch looks very good.

Thank you very much!

Thanks a lot!

2010/1/5 Mikhail T. <mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com>:
> Gentlemen!
>
> As posted there are some minor issues with the port:
>
> =A01. PORTVERSION and DISTVERSION can not be co-exist in the same
> =A0 =A0 Makefile -- if DISTVERSION is present, PORTVERSION is produced
> =A0 =A0 automatically.
> =A02. When the authors produce a new release (1.0-Chipmunk-15, for
> =A0 =A0 example), the PORTVERSION ought to go up... It should be somethin=
g
> =A0 =A0 like 1.0.15. However, if we set the DISTVERSION to 1.0-Chipmunk-1=
4
> =A0 =A0 now, then the automatically-created PORTVERSION will be 1.0.c.14.
> =A0 =A0 This would've been fine, if we knew, the next release is not goin=
g
> =A0 =A0 to be 1.0-Baboon-15, which would send us backwards (1.0.b.15 <
> =A0 =A0 1.0.c.14)... Therefor, I propose we ignore the release mascot and
> =A0 =A0 force PORTVERSION to 1.0.14 now.
> =A03. The head of the Makefile contains a typo (``Date create''), that
> =A0 =A0 portlint does not like.
> =A04. The port can (and thus should) be built in parallel.
>
> I'm ready to commit this with the attached modification to the Makefile.
> (Sorry, Philip -- I started looking at it before noticing, that you are
> interested too...) Yours,
>
> =A0 -mi
>
>
